repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md ExactID catalogue is seed-empty

published_prior_art.cite: Hahn1998Econometrica + ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022AutoDML: canonical unconfounded ATE EIF/AIPW/Riesz baseline

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v2 Conjecture 2 is adjacent on LRO/ADML coefficient-space equivalence, but does not state the full-report CEINR Gram certificate Xi_J=(U_J,S_J,T_J)

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022AutoDML + BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2025ABW give LRO/ADML/Riesz machinery, not this ATE-specific CEINR row-alignment iff

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v2 is adjacent on finite-support LRO normalization separation, but not the two-cell CEINR plug-in/span-correct class with U_J=S_J=0<T_J

published_prior_art.cite: Hansen1982Econometrica + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO supply GMM/LRO aggregation, not a relative-open ATE class where span holds but row alignment fails

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The LRO comparator is misanchored: CEINR eqs. (2.10)-(2.11) are the automatic alpha/Riesz estimation problem, not the GMM report or variance aggregation formula; the report/aggregation anchor should be corrected, e.g. to the orthogonal moment and GMM variance formulas around eqs. (2.3) and (2.8).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace every claim that CEINR eqs. (2.10)-(2.11) give the LRO report formula with precise anchors separating orthogonal moment construction, variance/report aggregation, and automatic Riesz estimation.
Add a named algebra lemma in Section 9 or 10: 'Gram certificate iff report equality', proving exactly how S_J=0 and T_J=0 imply G_J kappa_J=c_J even when G_J is singular.
Add a plug-in empirical diagnostic corollary for Xi_J(P) with the sample objects an applied LRO workflow would compute, so the flagship contribution is not only a population classification.

recommended_next_step: Patch the LRO location-level comparator anchors and add the singular-Gram algebra lemma before another Stage -0.5 pass.
